_metadata.comment: This block is an AI translation prompt guide for future automated translations.
_metadata.instructions: When translating keys from this file to other languages, preserve the keys exactly. Translate the values to the target language naturally, maintaining technical context of a GUI automation editor (Tauri, React, Rust, React Flow). For terms like 'BBOX', 'OCR', 'YOLO', keep them or adapt to standard local technical terms.
